news.title:
KRBL CFO Ashish Jain discussed the company's Middle East exposure on NDTV Profit.
The interaction, held on March 5, 2026, aligns with SEBI's Regulation 30 disclosure norms.
news.summary:
KRBL CFO Ashish Jain discussed the company's Middle East exposure on NDTV Profit.
The interaction, held on March 5, 2026, aligns with SEBI's Regulation 30 disclosure norms.

news.title:
KRBL reports basmati rice prices dropped by ₹50/tonne last week.
West Asia production halted, posing risks; region contributes 30% of revenue.
news.summary:
KRBL reports basmati rice prices dropped by ₹50/tonne last week.
West Asia production halted, posing risks; region contributes 30% of revenue.

news.title: KRBL shares dropped 5% following Iran's reported ban on food exports.
news.summary: KRBL shares dropped 5% following Iran's reported ban on food exports.

news.title:
FMCG firms like KRBL, LT Foods, and Parle face price pressures due to West Asia conflict.
Closure of Strait of Hormuz and crude price hikes may increase input costs for exporters.
news.summary:
FMCG firms like KRBL, LT Foods, and Parle face price pressures due to West Asia conflict.
Closure of Strait of Hormuz and crude price hikes may increase input costs for exporters.

news.title:
Arbitration tribunal ruled KRBL to pay USD 2.2M plus interest to RTC.
No fraud found; KRBL to legally challenge the award within time limits.
news.summary:
Arbitration tribunal ruled KRBL to pay USD 2.2M plus interest to RTC.
No fraud found; KRBL to legally challenge the award within time limits.

news.title:
KRBL Ltd's global rice production remains steady, with rising demand in Asia and Africa.
Export revenue fell in Q3, but 9M exports rose 21% YoY; domestic sales stable with margin gains.
news.summary:
KRBL Ltd's global rice production remains steady, with rising demand in Asia and Africa.
Export revenue fell in Q3, but 9M exports rose 21% YoY; domestic sales stable with margin gains.

news.title:
KRBL Ltd announces analyst/investor meet on March 2, 2026, with Banyan Capital Advisors.
The meeting will be physical and no unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared.
news.summary:
KRBL Ltd announces analyst/investor meet on March 2, 2026, with Banyan Capital Advisors.
The meeting will be physical and no unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared.

news.title:
KRBL sees strong Saudi business growth due to steady demand and shipments.
KRBL's Iran business improves over last year, showing overall positive performance.
news.summary:
KRBL sees strong Saudi business growth due to steady demand and shipments.
KRBL's Iran business improves over last year, showing overall positive performance.

news.title:
KRBL expects mid to early double-digit growth due to strong bulk pack demand and rising e-commerce interest.
Ghaziabad land monetization delayed by 2-3 years due to plant relocation costs exceeding INR 500-600 crore.
news.summary:
KRBL expects mid to early double-digit growth due to strong bulk pack demand and rising e-commerce interest.
Ghaziabad land monetization delayed by 2-3 years due to plant relocation costs exceeding INR 500-600 crore.

news.title:
KRBL forecasts Q4 FY2026 EBITDA growth of 200-250 bps.
FY2027 EBITDA stable; export volumes to rise 15% next year.
news.summary:
KRBL forecasts Q4 FY2026 EBITDA growth of 200-250 bps.
FY2027 EBITDA stable; export volumes to rise 15% next year.

news.title:
KRBL Ltd CFO Ashish Jain shared business insights with ET NOW on Feb 17, 2026.
The interaction video was shared officially, ensuring regulatory compliance.
news.summary:
KRBL Ltd CFO Ashish Jain shared business insights with ET NOW on Feb 17, 2026.
The interaction video was shared officially, ensuring regulatory compliance.

news.title:
KRBL's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹2.29B from ₹1.95B YoY, showing strong performance.
EBITDA margin improved to 15.5% from 11.6% YoY, indicating higher efficiency.
news.summary:
KRBL's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹2.29B from ₹1.95B YoY, showing strong performance.
EBITDA margin improved to 15.5% from 11.6% YoY, indicating higher efficiency.

news.title:
KRBL Ltd's Q3 FY26 revenue fell 12% YoY due to lower exports.
9M FY26 revenue rose 10%, aided by export and domestic growth.
news.summary:
KRBL Ltd's Q3 FY26 revenue fell 12% YoY due to lower exports.
9M FY26 revenue rose 10%, aided by export and domestic growth.

news.title:
KRBL Ltd's board approved Q3 results: revenue ₹769.3 Cr, PAT ₹169.9 Cr.
ED probe on JMD, AgustaWestland case shows no financial impact yet.
news.summary:
KRBL Ltd's board approved Q3 results: revenue ₹769.3 Cr, PAT ₹169.9 Cr.
ED probe on JMD, AgustaWestland case shows no financial impact yet.

news.title:
KRBL Ltd to hold an analyst/investor conference call on Feb 17, 2026, at 12:00 PM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
The Q3 FY26 results will be announced on Feb 14, 2026; senior management will address the call.
news.summary:
KRBL Ltd to hold an analyst/investor conference call on Feb 17, 2026, at 12:00 PM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
The Q3 FY26 results will be announced on Feb 14, 2026; senior management will address the call.

news.title:
KRBL Ltd's appeals succeeded; original Customs orders set aside by Appellate Authority.
The company plans to seek a refund of pre-deposited fines, resolving compliance issues.
news.summary:
KRBL Ltd's appeals succeeded; original Customs orders set aside by Appellate Authority.
The company plans to seek a refund of pre-deposited fines, resolving compliance issues.

news.title: KRBL Ltd stated that the appellate authority has allowed appeals and set aside orders.
news.summary: KRBL Ltd stated that the appellate authority has allowed appeals and set aside orders.

news.title:
KRBL reports Indian rice exports to Iran valued at $8-10M remain significant.
This is despite 25% US tariffs and concerns over unrest in Iran.
news.summary:
KRBL reports Indian rice exports to Iran valued at $8-10M remain significant.
This is despite 25% US tariffs and concerns over unrest in Iran.

news.title: KRBL and LT Foods face scrutiny after Trump's 25% tariff threat on Iran trade.
news.summary: KRBL and LT Foods face scrutiny after Trump's 25% tariff threat on Iran trade.

news.title:
US imposes 25% tariff on goods from countries trading with Iran, affecting exporters like LT Foods, KRBL, and Chaman Lal Setia.
LT Foods, KRBL, and Chaman Lal Setia shares fell 2-3% amid concerns over potential indirect impact on basmati rice export markets.
news.summary:
US imposes 25% tariff on goods from countries trading with Iran, affecting exporters like LT Foods, KRBL, and Chaman Lal Setia.
LT Foods, KRBL, and Chaman Lal Setia shares fell 2-3% amid concerns over potential indirect impact on basmati rice export markets.
